subject: Speakers won't reconnect to Wi-Fi after update
body: My Summit One Active speakers stopped connecting to Wi-Fi right after the last firmware update. I'm on the 5GHz band and the app shows firmware version 2.3.1 installed. They worked fine before the update.

subject: Wi-Fi keeps dropping on my speaker
body: My Summit One Active speaker keeps losing its Wi-Fi connection every couple of hours and I have to restart it. This has been happening for a week.

subject: Bluetooth pairing drops during playback
body: I paired my Summit One Active with my iPhone and it's running firmware version 1.8.0. The Bluetooth connection drops every 10 minutes during playback.

subject: Can't get Bluetooth to pair with my DAC
body: I've been trying to connect my AeroDAC 2 to a device over Bluetooth for the last hour and it just won't pair no matter what I do.

subject: Firmware update fails to install
body: My Cedar Stream Mini is stuck trying to update from firmware version 3.1.0 to 3.2.0 - it gets to 40% and fails every time.

subject: Should I update my speaker firmware?
body: I saw there might be a new firmware update available for my speaker. Is it worth installing or are there known issues?

subject: Speakers sound distorted at high volume
body: My Summit One Bookshelf speakers, connected via the aux input from my turntable's preamp, sound crackly and distorted whenever I turn the volume up to about 75%. At lower volume they sound fine.

subject: Sound quality got worse recently
body: The sound from my system has just gotten worse over the last few weeks, kind of muddy and unclear. Not sure what changed.

subject: Will this amp work with my speakers?
body: I'm considering pairing my Cedar 200 Integrated Amp with a pair of speakers rated at 4 ohms and 100 watts. Is that a safe match for this amp?

subject: Not sure if my amp is powerful enough
body: I just got my Summit One Bookshelf speakers and I'm wondering if my current amplifier is going to be enough to drive them properly.

subject: Subwoofer crossover setting help
body: I just set up my RidgeSub 8 in a medium-sized living room, roughly 300 square feet, and I've set the crossover to 80Hz. Is that a reasonable starting point?

subject: Subwoofer sounds too weak
body: My RidgeSub 8 just doesn't seem to be putting out much bass at all compared to what I expected.

subject: DAC only outputs sound on one channel
body: I bought my AeroDAC 2 on March 3rd and it worked fine for the first week. Now it only outputs sound on the left channel every time I use it, regardless of source.

subject: Microphone seems unresponsive
body: My room calibration microphone just doesn't seem to be doing anything when I try to run a calibration. It's been like this since I opened the box.

subject: Subwoofer arrived damaged
body: My order number ORD-58291 arrived today and the RidgeSub 8 box was crushed on one side, and the cabinet itself has a visible dent on the front panel.

subject: Stand box looked damaged
body: The box for my speaker stands looked a little beat up when it arrived but I haven't opened it yet to check if anything inside is broken.

subject: Requesting a return for my speakers
body: I'd like to return my Summit One Bookshelf speakers, order number ORD-77210. I'm requesting a return because they don't fit the aesthetic of my living room.

subject: How do I send this back?
body: I don't think I want to keep the subwoofer I ordered. What's the process to send it back?

subject: Registering my amp for warranty
body: I bought my Cedar 200 Integrated Amp last week and want to register it for warranty. I still have the receipt if you need the details.

subject: Is my microphone still under warranty?
body: I'm trying to figure out if my calibration microphone is still covered under warranty.

subject: Charged twice for my streamer order
body: I noticed I was charged twice for the same order, order number ORD-40118, when I bought my Cedar Stream Mini last week. Can you help sort this out?

subject: Question about my order
body: I placed an order for the AeroDAC 2 a few days ago and wanted to check on its status.

subject: Help assembling my speaker stands
body: I just unboxed my PeakStand 24 speaker stands and I'm not sure how to assemble the base plate to the column. The instructions aren't very clear.

subject: What does the RoomTune Mic actually measure?
body: I'm curious what exactly the RoomTune Mic measures during calibration and how long the process usually takes.

subject: Burning smell coming from my amplifier
body: I noticed a burning smell coming from my Cedar 200 Integrated Amp last night after about 20 minutes of use, and I immediately turned it off. I bought it about two months ago and this has never happened before until now.
